title: How to Upload Music to Spotify
metaTitle: How to Upload Music to Spotify | Distrozi Music Distribution
metaDescription: Read about How to Upload Music to Spotify. Learn how to distribute your music globally, protect copyrights, and maximize streaming royalties with Distrozi.
author: Distrozi Editorial Team

content.text: Navigating the digital music ecosystem requires a clear understanding of how distributors, stores, and registration agencies interact. Correctly preparing your files and metadata is the key to preventing release delays and ensuring you collect every cent your music generates.
Upload your music and metadata to Distrozi. Schedule your release at least 14 days in advance to allow processing and playlist pitching.
We process and deliver your tracks to Spotify within 24-48 hours. You will receive notification once delivery is successful.
Claim your Spotify for Artists profile to gain access to real-time analytics, edit your bio, and add custom canvas background loop videos.
Step 4: Pitch to Spotify Editorial Playlists
At least 7 days before release, submit your track via the Spotify for Artists dashboard to be considered for official editorial playlists.

faq.question: How long does it take for a song to go live on Spotify?
faq.answer: Delivery takes 24-48 hours. However, we suggest scheduling your release at least 14 days in advance to allow for playlist pitching.

faq.question: What is the difference between an ISRC code and a UPC code?
faq.answer: An ISRC code tracks streams and play metrics for individual songs, while a UPC code tracks sales metrics for the overall single or album release product.
